expectations.text: Optional email field uses Option.map pattern for conditional rendering
expectations.evidence: user.email.map() pattern correctly wraps conditional email display

expectations.text: Optional avatar image uses Option.map with img element (void element, no children)
expectations.evidence: user.avatar.map() correctly applies to img element without attempting to add children

expectations.text: Conditional role badge uses if/else pattern for admin status
expectations.evidence: if (user.isAdmin) ... else Dom.empty pattern properly handles role badge visibility

expectations.text: img element correctly uses alt attribute instead of attempting children
expectations.evidence: img element self-closing with attributes only, no child content attempted

expectations.text: Semantic HTML structure with proper landmark elements (article, section, dl)
expectations.evidence: Page uses semantic HTML5 elements: article, section, dl for proper document structure

expectations.text: Rendering produces valid HTML with proper handling of Option.empty and when false
expectations.evidence: Multiple conditional branches properly render or return Dom.empty as appropriate

expectations.text: Example users demonstrate all scenarios: admin+avatar, regular+email, avatar-only, minimal
expectations.evidence: Four distinct User examples cover all combinations of optional fields
